name: @quoin/tokens-ant
description: Ant Design (light theme) palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Values read byte-faithfully from @ant-design/colors. Each ramp is a 10-entry hex array indexed 1-10 in Ant's own docs (step 6 = the 'solid' tone). To regenerate against a different seed, call generate('#hex') from the same library. Extraction method: B. Algorithm: @ant-design/colors@8.0.1, inputs "package default seeds". Mapping: Ant Design canonical 10-step ramps for blue/red/green/gold/orange/purple/cyan/magenta/grey. Accent = blue.6 (daybreak), critical = red.5, success = green.6, warning = gold.6, info = blue.6 per Ant's own status-colour convention.
